3182080.name: Duskmire Demo
3182080.description: Duskmire's demo offers you the opportunity to experience the core action mechanics of the game and experiment with a selection of spells. Please note that this demo is a limited preview, and as such, end-game bosses, certain items, and additional spells are not included. While playing, remember that this is a demo, and some features are intentionally withheld. We greatly appreciate your understanding and feedback as you play through this early version of the game. Thank you in advance for your time and for trying out our demo!
3182080.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 土耳其语
